items.title: Danielle Smith Is Betraying Rural Alberta To Build Gas-Powered Data Centres
items.description:

items.title: Reform Donor Expands Fossil Fuel Portfolio to £300 Million
items.description:
A major right-wing political funder has dramatically increased his fossil fuel investments this year, DeSmog can reveal. Jeremy Hosking, who owns the hedge fund Hosking Partners, donated £1.7 million to Reform UK between 2019 and 2024. The party, led by Nigel Farage, campaigns to scrap the UK’s flagship 2050 net zero emissions target, remove environmental […]

items.title: French PR Executive Behind Facebook Network Spreading Heat Pump Hate
items.description:

items.description:
